Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPCOND1 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform FHIR Functions;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; ENCODE^VPRJSON 6411 ; GET^VPRDJ 2741 ; RDCOND(SOURCE,TARGET) ; Read Condition N CONDITIO,X,DFN,ICN,RES S (DFN,ICN)="" F X="conditionId" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) ; I CONDITIO="" D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","not-found","MSG_RESOURCE_ID_MISSING","Universal Identifier is required.","RDCOND^DVPCOND1") ; I '$$SITECHK^DVPXUTL(CONDITIO,"RDCOND^DVPCOND1") G QUIT I $P(CONDITIO,":",5)="",+$P(CONDITIO,":",6)=0 D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","code-invalid","MSG_ID_INVALID","The supplied conditionId: "_CONDITIO_" has an invalid format.","RDCOND^DVPCOND1") S ICN=$P(CONDITIO,":",5) I $$PATCHECK^DVPUTLS(ICN,"RDCOND^DVPCOND1")=0 G QUIT ;S $P(CONDITIO,":",5)=DFN ; I '$$FHRCOND(.RES,CONDITIO,ICN,0) D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","not-found","MSG_NO_EXIST","Condition not found for Id: "_CONDITIO,"RDCOND^DVPCOND1") ; M @TARGET@("results","condition")=RES QUIT ; Q ; FHRCOND(RES,UID,ICN,SUMMARY) ; N FILTER,QRY,TMP,DVPCID,DVPL S DVPCID=$P(UID,":",6) D DETAIL^GMPLUTL2(DVPCID,.DVPL) I '$D(DVPL) Q 0 ; ; Identifier S X="usual^^http://lighthouse.va.gov/identifiers/vista/ien^"_UID N IDENT D IDENT^DVPXUTL(.IDENT,X) M RES("identifier")=IDENT ; ; category I 'SUMMARY S RES("category")="problem-list-item" ; ; clinicalStatus I $G(DVPL("STATUS"))]"" S RES("clinicalStatus")=$$LOW^XLFSTR(DVPL("STATUS")) ; ; verificationStatus N DVPSTS S DVPSTS=$E($G(DVPL("CONDITION"),1)) S VERSTS=$S(DVPSTS="T":"provisional",DVPSTS="P":"confirmed",DVPSTS="H":"entered-in-error",1:"unknown") S RES("verificationStatus")=VERSTS ; ; code I $G(DVPL("SCTC"))]"" S RES("code","coding","code")=DVPL("SCTC"),RES("code","coding","system")="http://snomed.info/sct" I $G(DVPL("SCTT"))]"" S RES("code","coding","display")=DVPL("SCTT"),RES("code","text")=DVPL("SCTT") ; ; severity I 'SUMMARY,$G(DVPL("PRIORITY"))'="" S RES("severity")=DVPL("PRIORITY") ; ; subject N PAT D FHIRPAT^DVPXUTL(.PAT,ICN) M RES("subject")=PAT ; ; onset date I $G(DVPL("ONSET"))]"" S RES("onset",1,"onsetDateTime")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL($$DATE^DVPXUTL(DVPL("ONSET"))) ; ; asserter I $G(DVPL("PROVIDER"))]"" S RES("asserter","display")=DVPL("PROVIDER") D . N ASS S ASS=$$GET1^DIQ(9000011,DVPCID_",",1.05,"I") . N PRC D FHIRPRC^DVPXUTL(.PRC,ASS) . M RES("asserter")=PRC ; ; assertedDate I $G(DVPL("RECORDED")) D . N DVPADT S DVPADT=$$DATE^DVPXUTL($P(DVPL("RECORDED"),U)) . S RES("assertedDate")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL(DVPADT) ; ; abatement I $G(DVPL("RESOLVED"))]"" D . N DVPRDT S DVPRDT=$$DATE^DVPXUTL(DVPL("RESOLVED")) . S RES("abatementDateTime")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL(DVPRDT) ; ; notes N X,I S I=0 F S I=$O(DVPL("COMMENT",I)) Q:I<1 D . S X=$G(DVPL("COMMENT",I)) . S RES("notes",I,"note")=$P(X,U,3) ; Q 1
